name: Harem Marriage
overview: All the men she has dated while living in Tokyo have been married. Tired of love and life in Tokyo, Koharu Maezono (Haruka Shimazaki) returns to her hometown. There, she learns that her father has fallen ill and the coffee shop Lupin, which her parents run, has been forced to close due to massive debts!

trailers.title: ドラマ＋「ハレ婚。」２分PR公開！1月16日(日)スタート！島崎遥香×稲葉友×浅川梨奈×柳ゆり菜！本気の「一夫多妻」ラブコメディ！
